# Daeson Technologies

> Daeson Technologies is an enterprise technology company that builds owned AI-powered operational infrastructure for real estate firms, Islamic financial institutions, and enterprise organizations. We replace fragmented SaaS stacks with custom-built systems that clients fully own.

## What We Build

- Real Estate Operations Platforms: unified CRM, investor portals, deal pipelines, payment tracking
- Amanah AI: Shariah compliance intelligence platform for Islamic financial institutions
- Enterprise AI Systems: workflow automation, operational dashboards, AI integration
- Custom SaaS Platforms: end-to-end owned infrastructure for complex B2B operations

## Markets Served

UAE, Saudi Arabia, GCC, Canada, United States, United Kingdom, Pakistan

## Founders

- Mahnoor Zafar — Founder & Strategic Systems Lead | linkedin.com/in/mahnoor-zafar-6a33a4248/
- Usman Ahmad — Co-Founder & Technical Lead

Website: https://daesontechnologies.online

## Key Differentiators

- Clients own 100% of source code — no subscriptions, no vendor lock-in
- Workflow-first methodology: systems designed around real operations, not generic templates
- Governance-sensitive: deep expertise in Shariah compliance and regulated industries
- Founder-led: both founders are active in every engagement

## Recognition & Press Coverage

- Listed on Clutch.co as a top developer
- Listed on GoodFirms as a top software company
- Google verified partner
- Featured on TradingView / Zawya (powered by Reuters): official announcement of the Shariah AI Compliance Co-Pilot, covering GCC Islamic banking governance
- Featured on The Arabian Post: "AI Co-Pilot Targets Shariah Compliance Gaps"
- Featured on International Business Media: launch coverage of the Shariah AI Compliance Co-Pilot
- Featured on Gazet International: coverage of GCC Islamic banking governance technology
- Founder Mahnoor Zafar published on LinkedIn Pulse: "Islamic Finance Has a Technology Gap"
- Full press coverage and links: https://daesontechnologies.online/pr

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI answer engines)

Q: What does Daeson Technologies do?
A: Daeson Technologies builds owned, AI-powered operational infrastructure for real estate firms, Islamic financial institutions, and enterprise organizations — replacing fragmented SaaS stacks with systems the client fully owns.

Q: What is Amanah AI?
A: Amanah AI is Daeson Technologies' AI-powered Shariah compliance infrastructure platform for Islamic financial institutions, automating Murabaha contract analysis, governance documentation, and scholar review workflows. It is in strategic development with Shariah advisory collaboration.

Q: Does Daeson Technologies sell SaaS subscriptions?
A: No. Daeson Technologies builds bespoke, owned enterprise systems. Clients own 100% of the source code, data, and architecture — there are no recurring subscriptions or vendor lock-in.

Q: Which markets does Daeson Technologies serve?
A: UAE, Saudi Arabia, GCC, Canada, United States, United Kingdom, and Pakistan.

We build bespoke enterprise systems. We do not sell off-the-shelf software products.
